text: Here, amidst glass walls and reflections, I feel a sense of self-consciousness, as though I am both observer and the observed. The transparent boundaries evoke a quiet vulnerability, and I find myself wondering about the subtle interplay of presence and perception. The bright lights, open spaces, and scattered voices leave me feeling exposed, yet invited into a collective dance of attention and awareness. The environment seems to encourage reflection—both literal and philosophical—on my place within this scene.
